meta.description: Find skilled people near you. Get found for the work you do.

hero.subhead: Sebenza matches South African talent to work by skill and place — with employment data you can actually trust.

pulseStrip.heading: National pulse
pulseStrip.subheading: Live, freshness-weighted — never stale, never spun.

trusted.title: Trusted profiles
trusted.body: Every qualification carries an honest verification state — never "Verified" by default.

live.title: Live availability
live.body: Our Talent Pulse keeps employment status fresh. Stale entries are down-ranked, not hidden.

real.title: Real employment data
real.body: Hires are counted only when confirmed on the platform — analytics you can act on.

employer.heading: Find verified, available talent in your city.
employer.body: Search by skill and location. Reveal contact details only after the candidate has consented — and every access is recorded.

government.heading: Workforce intelligence in real time.
government.body: Real-time employment analytics by skill, location, and freshness — exportable, aggregate, never personal.

footer.rights: © 2026 Sebenza. A national talent platform for South Africa.

common.demoNotice: Demo mode — no real authentication yet. Wires up in Phase 2 (Better Auth).

signIn.heading: Sign in to your account
signIn.subhead: Job seekers, employers and administrators all sign in here. We'll route you to the right dashboard.
signIn.twoFactor: Two-factor authentication is required for employers and administrators.

signUp.heading: Join Sebenza
signUp.subhead: Which side of the platform are you joining?

seekerCard.title: Job seeker
seekerCard.body: Build a verified profile, keep a live employment status, and get found for the work you do.

employerCard.title: Employer or recruiter
employerCard.body: Search verified talent by skill and location. Two-factor auth required. Your organisation must be verified before contact details unlock.

signUp.adminNotice: Administrator accounts are issued by Sebenza — not self-registered. If you've been invited, sign in with the credentials in your invitation email.

step1.heading: Tell us who you are
step1.subhead: These basics only. We'll add the rest of your profile after consent.

step2.heading: Your consent matters
step2.subhead: Your profile is not searchable until you say it can be. You can revoke consent any time from your privacy centre.

purposes.searchability: Searchability — let employers find me by skill + location
purposes.contact_reveal: Contact reveal — allow verified employers to request my contact details, audit-logged
purposes.document_sharing: Document sharing — allow verified employers to request my qualifications
purposes.analytics_aggregate: Aggregate analytics — count me in national employment statistics (no personal data shared)

step2.required: Required for your profile to appear in search results.

step3.heading: Your first profile fields
step3.subhead: You can edit any of this later from your profile editor.
step3.locationLabel: Where do you live / want to work?
step3.studentToggleHint: Tick this if you're enrolled in a SA university, university of technology, TVET, UNISA, or INDLELA programme. We'll capture your academic details so Sebenza can recommend electives, internships and graduate programmes — not just full hires.

academic.heading: Your studies
academic.openToGraduateProgrammes: Open to graduate / articles programmes after graduation

stepHints.name: Goes on your profile as "First L." by default — your full surname only appears after you grant contact consent.
stepHints.id: We'll encrypt this immediately. It is never displayed back — even to you, even to admins.

employerSignUp.heading: Register your organisation
employerSignUp.subhead: Your organisation starts in the "unverified" state. You can search talent, but contact details and documents stay locked until verification is complete.
employerSignUp.twoFactorNote: Two-factor authentication is mandatory for employer accounts. You'll be guided through TOTP setup on your first sign-in.

verify.heading: Check your inbox
verify.subhead: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to confirm your email address.

forgot.heading: Reset your password
forgot.subhead: Enter your account email and we'll send you a one-time link to set a new password.

filters.title: Filters
filters.nationalityHelp: Sebenza matches by location and skill. Nationality is shown, never a barrier.

states.emptyBody: Try broadening the location or removing a filter. Your search is also being recorded — anonymised — so we can show policymakers where the skill gaps are.
states.errorBody: We couldn't reach the talent index. Please try again.

freshness.ageingHelp: 30 to 90 days old — slight down-rank, nudge sent.
freshness.staleHelp: 90+ days old — strongly down-ranked, flagged in analytics.

profile.studiesSub: Self-reported until verified by the institution + SAQA in Phase 8.

locked.lockedBody: Verified employers can request to view this. Every access is consent-checked and recorded.
locked.lockedCta: Sign in as a verified employer
locked.seekerHint: We never show your ID number, documents, or contact details in search results — even to verified employers, until you consent.

profile.redacted: (Surname is hidden in public search until you consent to be contacted.)

overview.nextAction: Add {n} more {n, plural, =1 {skill} other {skills}} to rank higher in search.
overview.pulseQuestion: Are you still open to work?
overview.noViewers: No one has viewed your profile yet.
overview.noContacts: No employers have contacted you yet.
overview.rankExplain: Your ranking in the chefs · Western Cape pool, by freshness × completeness.

profileEditor.title: Profile editor
profileEditor.subtitle: Everything here flows into your public dossier and the national analytics. We never display your ID number — it's encrypted on save.

academic.heading: Your studies
academic.subhead: Tell us where and what you're studying — Sebenza will tune your Career compass to your programme and your remaining time before graduation.
academic.kindHint: Recognised SA institutions only: public universities, universities of technology, TVET colleges, UNISA, INDLELA.
academic.verificationNote: We never display a 'verified' badge for self-reported enrolment. Verification arrives via SAQA + institution partnerships in Phase 8.
academic.openToGraduateProgrammes: Open to graduate / articles programmes after graduation

fields.displayNameHelp: How you appear in public search (e.g. "Thandeka M."). Your surname only reveals after contact consent.
fields.nationalIdHelp: Encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM the moment you save. Never displayed back. Used only for verification — never shared.
fields.citizen: I am a South African citizen
fields.willingToRelocate: Open to relocating for the right role
fields.headline: Public headline
fields.bioHelp: Two or three sentences — what you're great at, and what you're looking for.

profileEditor.savedHint: Autosaves as you type. Encrypted fields persist on blur.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: Roles, dates, accomplishments. Reorder anytime.
experience.empty: You haven't added any experience yet. Adding three or more roles improves your ranking significantly.

qualifications.title: Qualifications & documents
qualifications.subtitle: Upload certificates as PDFs or images. Files are stored in a private bucket — only verified employers can request to view them, and every access is audit-logged.
qualifications.empty: No qualifications yet. Adding at least one trade certificate or diploma builds employer trust.

activity.title: Activity
activity.subtitle: Every interaction with your profile, audit-logged for your transparency.

privacy.title: Privacy & consent
privacy.subtitle: You control what Sebenza can do with your data. Revoke any consent below at any time.
privacy.noConsent: No active consents — your profile is not searchable.
privacy.exportTitle: Export everything I have on Sebenza
privacy.exportBody: We'll generate a JSON file with your profile, experience, qualifications, consents and audit log. Delivered to your registered email within 30 days (POPIA section 23).
privacy.deleteBody: Soft-deletes your profile immediately (no longer searchable). A 30-day grace period applies — after that we permanently erase. Audit logs are retained anonymised, as POPIA requires.

grow.title: Career compass
grow.subtitle: What to learn next — grounded in real employer demand near you. We don't sell courses; we point at what's working.
grow.headline: Learn {n, plural, =1 {# skill} other {# skills}} → move from #{from} to #{to}
grow.headlineSub: Projected rank in your local pool: {pool}
grow.recommendationsSub: Picked from the biggest gaps between what employers search for and what they find.

reason.common_among_top_ranked: Common at top of your pool
reason.adjacent_role: Builds on what you already have

grow.rankIfLearned: If you add this: rank → #{projected} in {pool}
grow.pathsSub: Free and subsidised options listed first. SA-recognised programmes only — SETA, TVET, INDLELA, SAQA-recognised, and open-source resources.
grow.adjacentSub: Roles your current skills overlap with — usually one or two skills away.
grow.cityDemandTitle: What employers are looking for in your province
grow.cityDemandSub: The gap column is the policy lever — and the seeker's opportunity.
grow.honestBody: Sebenza doesn't accept money from learning providers. We list public, SA-recognised paths first because they're real and reachable. If a course isn't here, it isn't necessarily bad — but we won't surface it without evidence it works.

student.headline: Bridge your degree to the market
student.subhead: You're {months, plural, =0 {graduating this month} =1 {one month from graduation} other {# months from graduation}}. Sebenza re-tunes the recommendations to what {programme} graduates actually need next.
student.electivesSub: Subjects you can still pick — chosen because the market is screaming for them in your province.
student.programmesSub: Real SA programmes — public sector first, then corporates and startups. Eligibility is shown honestly — we'd rather tell you upfront if you don't qualify than waste your time.
student.destinationsSub: Aggregated from confirmed placements on Sebenza. No personal data is exposed — only the destination type and share.
student.medianMonths: {months, plural, =1 {≈1 month to placement} other {≈# months to placement}}
student.supplementarySub: Gaps almost every CS / accounting graduate carries into their first role. All free.

employerDash.title: Employer workspace
employerDash.orgUnverifiedBanner: Your organisation is not yet verified. You can search talent and build shortlists, but contact details and documents stay locked until verification is complete.

overview.placementNudge: Hired this candidate? Confirming hires keeps national data honest — and earns your organisation a small analytics credit.
overview.noMatches: No matches in this saved search
overview.broadenHelp: Broaden your filters, or save the gap — we feed it into national skills-gap analytics.

savedSearches.title: Saved searches
savedSearches.subtitle: Reusable filter sets. New matches alert you by email — you decide the cadence.
savedSearches.newMatches: {n} new {n, plural, =1 {match} other {matches}} since last visit

shortlists.title: Talent pools
shortlists.subtitle: Curated shortlists per role or campaign. Share internally; never export PII.

placements.title: Placements
placements.subtitle: Every hire your organisation has confirmed on Sebenza. Feeds the national placement analytics (Phase 6).
placements.noPlacements: No placements logged yet. Log your first hire to earn a small analytics credit.

organisation.title: Organisation
organisation.subtitle: Your registered profile. Verification status determines what you can unlock.
organisation.kycSlot: Verification handled by partner KYC provider (Phase 8).

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Add colleagues to your workspace. Each member's access is audit-logged separately.

verifications.title: Verification queue
verifications.subtitle: Review qualifications and organisations. Approve, reject with reason, or escalate.

moderation.title: Moderation queue
moderation.subtitle: Reported profiles and content. Suspend, restore, or close as no-action.

taxonomy.title: Reference data
taxonomy.subtitle: Controlled vocabularies. No free-text in search.

auditLog.title: Audit log
auditLog.subtitle: Every PII access, in chronological order. POPIA-compliant retention applies.
auditLog.noEvents: No PII access yet this session. Visit /search or open a profile and reload — every event will appear here.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Search by handle, email, or role. Account actions are audit-logged.

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.subtitle: Feature flags, freshness bands, ranking weights.

insights.title: Employment insights
insights.subtitle: Freshness-weighted. Aggregate only. Updated continuously.
insights.skillsGapHelp: When searches dwarf matches, we have a skills gap. This is the policy lever.
insights.confidenceHelp: Freshness confidence: the higher the share of recently-confirmed statuses, the higher the confidence.
insights.exportNote: Exports are aggregate only. No personal data leaves the system. Every export is logged.

errors.notFoundBody: We couldn't find that page. It may have moved, or it never existed.
errors.errorBody: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
